/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libpanda_mujoco_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libpanda_mujoco_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/panda_mujoco_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/panda_mujoco_msgs/msg/ee_delta_command__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/cyw/panda_vla_project/ros2_ws/build/panda_mujoco_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libpanda_mujoco_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
